title: Settings
scope: These apply to <0>{{name}}</0> and all its {{members}} — not your other businesses. Use the picker (top-right) to configure a different one.

capturePolicy.title: Capture policy
capturePolicy.desc: These apply to every {{member}}'s app on {{name}}. When {{member}} overrides are off, {{members}} can't change them on their machine.

screenshotInterval.title: Screenshot interval
screenshotInterval.desc: How often each {{member}}'s screen is captured.

idleThreshold.title: Idle threshold
idleThreshold.desc: No input for this long pauses active-time counting.

retention.title: Screenshot retention
retention.desc: How long the backend keeps uploaded screenshots for {{name}}. "Never" keeps them indefinitely.

cleanup.title: Clean up screenshots now
cleanup.desc: Immediately delete {{name}}'s screenshots (files and records) older than the chosen age. This cannot be undone.
cleanup.warning: Files and records older than {{days}} days are permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
